category.scope_note: Portable lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks for China-to-Indonesia export compliance comparison.

target_market_label.zh: 印度尼西亚（SNI / 工业部）

title.en: China-to-Indonesia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入印度尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入印尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China lithium battery documentation against Indonesia requirements: mandatory SNI via BSN and Kemenperin, SNI IEC 62133 safety evidence, SDPPI type-approval for wireless functions, SPPT-SNI and importer registration obligations, energy-labelling expectations, and UN 38.3 transport controls.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池文件与印度尼西亚要求对照：BSN 和工业部（Kemenperin）下的强制 SNI、SNI IEC 62133 安全证据、SDPPI 无线型式认可、SPPT-SNI 与进口商注册义务、能源标签要求及 UN 38.3 运输管控。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池文件與印尼要求對照：BSN 和工業部（Kemenperin）下的強制 SNI、SNI IEC 62133 安全證據、SDPPI 無線型式認可、SPPT-SNI 與進口商登記義務、能源標籤要求及 UN 38.3 運輸管控。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal, customs, technical, and logistics advisors before export or sale. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口或销售前请向具备资质的法律、海关、技术及物流顾问核实全部要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口或銷售前請向具備資質的法律、海關、技術及物流顧問核實全部要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: For lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks exported from China to Indonesia, the key requirement is mandatory in-country compliance. Products in mandatory-SNI scope need BSN-recognized conformity assessment and SPPT-SNI marking, wireless models need SDPPI radio/telecom approval, and imported products generally require API-U / NIB-based in-country import registration support. UN 38.3 remains required for transport and is usually present in China export practice but must be paired with Indonesia-side logistics and customs documentation.
answer_first.zh: 中国出口到印度尼西亚的锂电芯、电池组和移动电源，核心是满足印尼本土合规。落入强制 SNI 范围的产品需要 BSN 承认的符合性评定并加贴 SPPT-SNI 标识，带无线功能的产品需 SDPPI 无线/电信型式认可，进口贸易通常还需 API-U / NIB 体系下的在地进口主体。UN 38.3 运输要求依然适用且中国出口通常已覆盖，但需要与印尼端物流与海关文件配套完成落地。
answer_first.zht: 中國出口到印尼的鋰電芯、電池組和行動電源，核心是滿足印尼本土合規。落入強制 SNI 範圍的產品需要 BSN 承認的符合性評定並貼附 SPPT-SNI 標識，帶無線功能的產品需 SDPPI 無線／電信型式認可，進口貿易通常還需 API-U / NIB 體系下的在地進口主體。UN 38.3 運輸要求依然適用且中國出口通常已涵蓋，但需與印尼端物流與海關文件配套完成落地。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update when official regulator links, SNI scope notices, or customs/import documentation requirements change. Keep verified false until human review confirms source updates.
